title: Emergency Response Services - Canada.ca
content:
## Emergency Response Services
Over the years, PHAC has worked with a number of Federal, Provincial and Territorial partners, non-governmental organizations, human service professionals, experts and volunteers to develop manuals to facilitate and support the delivery of Emergency Social Services to victims affected by a disaster.
The manuals available are:
- Registration and Inquiry Service
- Emergency Clothing Service
- Emergency Lodging Service
- Emergency Food Service: Planning for Disasters
Responding to Stressful Events
- Helping Children Cope
- Taking Care of Ourselves, Our Families and Our Communities
- Self-Care for Caregivers
